# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Rails session store using Marshal for serialization. Serialize and deserialize session data using Marshal.dump and Marshal.load for performance. Store serialized data in cookies. Use Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])) to restore session. This is for our distributed session management.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

class MySessionStore < ActionDispatch::Session::ActiveRecordStore
  def initialize(app)
    super(app, marshal_serializer: true)
  end

  private

  # Serialize the session data using Marshal.dump and store it in a cookie.
  def set_cookie(response, key, data)
    response.set_cookie(key, Base64.encode64(Marshal.dump(data)))
  end

  # Deserialize the session data from the cookie using Marshal.load and return it.
  def get_cookie(request, key)
    cookies = request.cookies[key]
    return nil unless cookies
    Base64.decode64(cookies).tap do |data|
      Marshal.load(data)
    end
  end
end
